articles.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer actor Nicholas Brendon dies aged 54 - BBC
articles.description: Brendon died of "natural cases", his family said in a statement, remembering him as "passionate" and "sensitive".

articles.title: Police video of Justin Timberlake's 2024 drunken driving arrest released - ABC7 Los Angeles
articles.description: The pop star tells officers at one point, "these are like really hard tests."

articles.title: Kendra Duggar arrested on Arkansas child endangerment, false imprisonment charges days after husband’s arrest - Northwest Arkansas Democrat-Gazette
articles.description: TONTITOWN -- Police on Friday arrested the wife of a former reality TV personality who was himself arrested only two days before.

articles.title: Bringing Rocky to Life: How ‘Project Hail Mary’ Puppeteer James Ortiz Created the Movie’s Lovable Alien - Variety
articles.description: 'Project Hail Mary' turned to puppeteer James Ortiz to bring Rocky, Ryan Gosling's alien buddy, to life.

articles.title: Rachel Lindsay Says Bachelor Franchise Over Amid Taylor Bachelorette Scandal - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: “The name Bachelorette, Bachelor is tainted at this point. How do you move forward past that? You can't,” the former lead said during a Thursday podcast, where she found out in real-time that season 22 had been pulled.

articles.title: Sylvester Stallone, Jean-Claude Van Damme, More Pay Tribute to Chuck Norris: 'An American Hero' - Rolling Stone
articles.description: Sylvester Stallone, Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dolph Lundgren and more have paid tribute to Chuck Norris, who died Thursday at age 86.
